title: No. 048 — Marble Pour ASMR
hook_3s: Glossy pastel marbles cascade from a tray in slow-mo, clicking into a labeled box — pure ASMR satisfaction.
scene_flow: 0–3s HOOK: Extreme close-up, slow-mo. A lavender tray tilts and glossy orange marbles pour out with crisp click-clack ASMR, landing into a clear box labeled 'ORANGE'. Title card 'No. 048 — MARBLE SORT' stamps in.
3–6s REVEAL: Camera pulls back to expose the full machine — multiple trays above, a moving conveyor belt mid-frame, and color-labeled boxes below. Marbles of mixed colors roll across the belt.
6–10s GAMEPLAY: Finger taps a tray; marbles drop, ride the conveyor, and a mis-sorted blue marble nearly lands in the orange box. Overlay: 'Tap to sort!'
10–13s TENSION → PAYOFF: Player times the next tap perfectly; every marble drops into its matching color box with a satisfying chime. Boxes glow, level-clear sparkle.
13–15s CTA: Phone mockup shows the App Store badge. Big orange CTA button pulses: 'Play Free'.
visual_direction: Clean, colorful 3D cartoon style with soft rounded shapes — glossy marbles with subtle subsurface highlights, matte pastel machine. Lavender (#E5DFFF) seamless studio background, light grey (#F0F0F8) conveyor and trays, vibrant orange (#FFB13B) accents on labels, title text, and CTA. Macro lens feel in the hook (shallow DOF, slow-mo), then a clean isometric pull-back for gameplay clarity. ASMR sound design: click-clack of marbles, soft mechanical whirr of the conveyor, gentle chime on success. Calm, premium, oddly-satisfying tone — zero clutter.
rationale: Adapts the proven ASMR-pour archetype directly onto the core loop: marbles (not flakes) pour from trays into color-labeled boxes, fixing the mechanic mismatch while preserving the satisfaction hook that wins with 25–55 female casual audiences. Lavender + orange palette locks brand identity, and the conveyor reveal at 3–6s telegraphs gameplay before the viewer can scroll. Test against a non-ASMR baseline; given thin cluster signal (1 creative), budget a small read first and scale on IPM lift.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, aspect 9:16, macro close-up of glossy vibrant orange (#FFB13B) marbles pouring in slow motion from a soft rounded light grey (#F0F0F8) tray into a clear cartoon box labeled 'ORANGE', seamless lavender (#E5DFFF) studio background, on-screen text 'No. 048 — MARBLE SORT' in bold rounded orange typography, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, premium ASMR product-shot aesthetic

Storyboard frame, aspect 9:16, isometric three-quarter view of a cute 3D cartoon sorting machine: stacked pastel trays on top, a light grey (#F0F0F8) conveyor belt in the middle carrying multicolored glossy marbles, three labeled color boxes below (orange, blue, pink), lavender (#E5DFFF) background, vibrant orange (#FFB13B) accent on a tappable button, on-screen text 'Tap to sort!' in rounded orange type, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, calm satisfying mood

Storyboard frame, aspect 9:16, payoff moment showing colored marbles dropping perfectly into matching color-labeled boxes with a soft glow and sparkle particles, lavender (#E5DFFF) background, light grey (#F0F0F8) machine, vibrant orange (#FFB13B) 'Level Clear ✨' badge popping in center, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, glossy marbles, cheerful satisfying lighting
